title: Varahanatha Temple
tagline: Varahanatha Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: The Varahanatha Temple, also known as Yajna Varaha Temple, is a Hindu temple complex, located on the left bank of the Vaitarani River on an island formed by the river, in Jajpur, O
overview.description: The Varahanatha Temple, also known as Yajna Varaha Temple, is a Hindu temple complex, located on the left bank of the Vaitarani River on an island formed by the river, in Jajpur, Odisha, India. The main shrine is dedicated to Varaha, the boar avatar of the god Vishnu. Built in 15-16th century, the temple is constructed in Kalinga architectural style. Besides the central Varaha shrine, there are numerous subordinate shrines to deities like Shiva, Vishnu, Vimala and others.

topPlaces.name: Narayana Gosain Temple
topPlaces.description: Narayan Gosain Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Singhapur Village in Jajpur district of Odisha, India which is dedicated to the god Vishnu (Narayana Gosain).

items.note: Narayan Gosain Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Singhapur Village in Jajpur district of Odisha, India which is dedicated to the god Vishnu (Narayana Gosain).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Varahanatha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Varahanatha Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Varahanatha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Varahanatha Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Varahanatha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Varahanatha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Varahanatha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Varahanatha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Narayana Gosain Temple.
